violations.text: Several Food Items in the walk-in cooler were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were moved to the walk-in freezer at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

Door(s) to the outside, located in the back and front entrance areas, were observed to be not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025

At the time of inspection, the walk-in cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Call for service/adjustment for proper ambient temperature control was made at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, confirmation of adjustment to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the walk-in cooler was observed to be maintaining ambient temperature of 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
The floor/wall juncture in the men's bathroom area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
